task: place rxbar blueberry into bottom drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A kitchen counter has a white bowl, a small dark rectangular object (rxbar blueberry), and a drawer with its front open. The drawer is empty. The rxbar blueberry is on the counter. STRATEGY - First, reach for and grasp the rxbar blueberry. Then, transport it to the open drawer. Finally, place it inside the drawer. Failure modes include dropping the object during transport or misplacing it outside the drawer. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the rxbar blueberry at its body for initial contact. Step 2 grasp the rxbar blueberry at its body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the rxbar blueberry to the open drawer. Step 4 place the rxbar blueberry inside the drawer.

Goal: inside(rxbar_blueberry, drawer)
Scene: rxbar_blueberry, bowl, drawer
Step 1: reach(rxbar_blueberry)
  affordance_region: the body of the rxbar blueberry
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, rxbar_blueberry, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, rxbar_blueberry) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(rxbar_blueberry)
  affordance_region: the body of the rxbar blueberry
  contact: holding(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(rxbar_blueberry)
Step 3: transport(rxbar_blueberry -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the open drawer
  spatial: above(rxbar_blueberry, drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(rxbar_blueberry)
  done_when: above(rxbar_blueberry, drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(rxbar_blueberry -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the open drawer
  contact: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, drawer) [completion]; released(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  pose: inside(rxbar_blueberry, drawer) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, drawer) AND released(rxbar_blueberry)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the rxbar blueberry
the body of the rxbar blueberry
